name: Add Provider Integration
description: Workflow for integrating a new AI provider into RealAI.

steps.task: Design the new provider integration: determine the base_url, default_model, api_format, key prefix for _KEY_PREFIX_TO_PROVIDER, and PROVIDER_ENV_VARS entry. Produce a brief ADR.
Implement the provider integration: add the entry to PROVIDER_CONFIGS and _KEY_PREFIX_TO_PROVIDER in realai.py, add the PROVIDER_ENV_VARS entry, and handle any api_format differences.
Update realai_api/providers.py and realai_api/config.py if needed to expose the new provider through the FastAPI server. Verify the /v1/models endpoint lists the provider's models.
Review the new provider integration for key exposure risks, env var naming consistency, and any authentication edge cases.
Write tests for the new provider: key prefix detection, env var fallback, and provider routing. Run python test_realai.py to confirm all tests pass.
Document the new provider in README.md: describe the env var to set, the key prefix format, and an example usage. Update the provider table in API.md.
